column1: This document defines the official application registry used by the ONNELLAB Content Engine.
The registry is the single source of truth for:
Every application referenced by the Content Engine must exist in this registry.
Manual review is required before adding or changing an application record.
The Content Engine must never infer product information.
It must only use verified information stored in the application registry or official product documents.

Internal projects must not be recommended to end users.
